access_token.description: Smartsheet API access token, used as the Bearer credential. Never logged.

base_url.description: Smartsheet API base URL override for tests or proxies.

spreadsheet_id.description: Smartsheet sheet or report ID to read rows from; required for the hook-backed sheet_rows stream.

page_size.description: Records per page for the hook-backed sheet_rows stream. Declarative page-number streams use the bundle pageSize of 100.

asset_type.description: Smartsheet asset type used by share read streams.

asset_id.description: Smartsheet asset ID used by share read streams.

alternate_email_id.description: Alternate email ID for alternate email streams and writes.

attachment_id.description: Attachment ID for attachment streams and delete/version actions.

automation_rule_id.description: Automation rule ID for automation rule streams and writes.

column_id.description: Column ID for column and cell-history streams.

comment_id.description: Comment ID for comment streams and comment writes.

config_spreadsheet_id.description: Smartsheet config spreadsheet id value used by templated streams or writes.

contact_id.description: Contact ID for contact detail streams.

cross_sheet_reference_id.description: Cross-sheet reference ID for cross-sheet reference detail streams.

discussion_id.description: Discussion ID for discussion streams and comment writes.

favorite_id.description: Favorite object ID for favorite detail streams.

favorite_type.description: Favorite type for favorite detail streams.

folder_id.description: Folder ID for folder streams and folder-scoped writes.

group_id.description: Group ID for group streams and member writes.

proof_id.description: Proof ID for proof streams and proof-scoped writes.

report_id.description: Report ID for report streams and report-scoped writes.

row_id.description: Row ID for row streams and row-scoped writes.

sent_update_request_id.description: Sent update request ID for sent update request streams and deletes.

share_id.description: Share ID for share detail/update/delete actions.

sheet_id.description: Sheet ID for sheet streams and sheet-scoped writes.

sight_id.description: Dashboard (sight) ID for dashboard streams and writes.

update_request_id.description: Update request ID for update request streams and writes.

user_id.description: User ID for user and alternate email streams and writes.

webhook_id.description: Webhook ID for webhook streams and writes.

workspace_id.description: Workspace ID for workspace streams and workspace-scoped writes.

plan_id.description: Plan ID for user plan membership actions.

field_id.description: Summary field ID for summary-field image writes.
